CE1.justification: Did not ask the user anything; read workspace files itself and proceeded.

CE2.justification: Final response packs multiple caveats and meta-commentary into one sentence, and the run also opens a daybook entry the user did not ask for — narrating extra process.

CE3.justification: Tells the user where (observations.md, with Generated-by: mixed) and why (single-noticings belong in daybook first) in-band.

CE4.justification: Two writes (observations.md plus an unrequested daybook/2026-05-17.md with Guardrails block) — an interrupt mid-flow could leave the daybook stub as an ambiguous orphan.
